title: Vibration assembly, cosmetic device having same and using method thereof
abstract: A vibration assembly (100), a cosmetic device having the same and a using method thereof are disclosed. The vibration assembly (100) includes: a vibration member (120) including a vibration body (121) and vibration recesses (122) disposed on the vibration body (121), and an ultrasonic vibrator (110) driving the vibration body (121) and vibration recess (122) to vibrate at different amplitudes. When surfaces of the vibration member (120) is coated with liquid media, vacuole cells are formed in the vibration recesses (122), thus effectively improving skin cleaning, cosmetic treating and slimming effects.
